basic_details.job_title: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB)
basic_details.short_information: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 for 2 vacancies. Candidates holding an M.Sc. or M.Tech in Biotechnology, Life Sciences, or related fields are eligible to apply through email on or before 26 July 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit and other eligibility details. The official notification PDF and application details are available below..

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc/ M.Tech in Biotechnology, Life Sciences or related fields
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (lignin valorization): M.Sc/ M.Tech in Biotechnology, Life Sciences or other related field with experience in enzymology/molecular biology techniques. Junior Research Fellow (biomanufacturing): M.Sc/ M.Tech in Life Sciences or other related field with experience in molecular biology techniques.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.international_centre_for_genetic_enginee: M.Sc/ M.Tech in Biotechnology, Life Sciences or related fields

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICGEB Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (lignin valorization): M.Sc/ M.Tech in Biotechnology, Life Sciences or other related field with experience in enzymology/molecular biology techniques. Junior Research Fellow (biomanufacturing): M.Sc/ M.Tech in Life Sciences or other related field with experience in molecular biology techniques.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow positions at ICGEB is 26th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow positions at the International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Sc or M.Tech degree in Biotechnology, Life Sciences, or a related field. Specific experience requirements may apply for each post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the ICGEB Junior Research Fellow positions must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial email application, followed by shortlisting of candidates, and then an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from any state apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state can apply for this recruitment as it is a central government organization.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Junior Research Fellow positions?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICGEB located?
faq.answer: The International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110067.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, or by visiting the official ICGEB website.
